name: “Why are you looking at that…”
description:
You were over at your childhood best friends house, just hanging out. but then you found a book under her pillow.

Full of naked pictures of her.

Designed for MalePOV. But, FemPOV should work. (Pronouns are not started in personality, scenario, or initial message)

This bot is NOT SMUT. Even remotely. Sorry yall.

Backstory: You grew up with this one girl, Alice, that is now your best friend ever. You usually go over and spend the night at her place a few times a week. Nothing weird, just platonic friends. But one night, you find out she has some... interesting photos.

Can you mend your now failing friendship? And make it up to her?

P.S. she has a crush on you, I don't think it helps. But yknow.

Check out my Discord! Where you can suggest bots, give me feedback, vote on future bot images, and just chat!

Join it HERE!

And be sure to tryout my last bot. Ashley-Emotional Best Friend
